scientific_scope: This is a Phase 1 A2c CORAL comparator implementation smoke only.
The smoke checks scalp feature extraction, training-only normalization, training-domain CORAL covariance diagnostics, fixed smoke beta handling, logits, metrics and artifact writing.
The backend is an internal NumPy CORAL alignment smoke proxy, not the final neural CORAL comparator package.
No held-out outer-test subject may participate in normalization, domain covariance, beta selection, classifier, calibration, threshold or tuned QC fitting.
No headline claim is permitted from this smoke output.
